title: Unblinking
description:
Welcome to UnblinkingA mind-bending puzzle game where the line between reality and madness becomes blurred. Solve increasingly difficult puzzles and prepare yourself to face the horrors lurking within.

Descend into Eldritch HorrorYou stand on the edge of an unfathomable abyss, with the weight of mortality looming over you... a condemned death row inmate forced to play a twisted survival game, navigating a maze composed of cubes... but not just any cubes. On all six sides, they are each adorned with unblinking eyes that stare back at you like cold calculating sentinels.

A Spark of HopeIf you can successfully navigate this twisted, ever changing nightmare and recover the relic, you will be granted back your freedom. 

Will you overcome the eldritch horrors within Unblinking, or will you succumb to madness and despair? You have only one way to find out.

Key Features:• 50 puzzles to break through.

• A unique, eldritch twist on traditional puzzle solving.

• Unsettling atmosphere and sound design.

• Increasingly complex challenges as you delve deeper into the angel's body.

• A dark, thought-provoking narrative that explores themes of mortality, madness, and redemption.

• Import your own avatar.
description_short: Inspired by the cult classic 'Intelligent Qube', this bite-sized puzzle game is a love letter to fans of challenging, brain-twisting fun. Can you solve your way out of the death row?
